name: ASRock B860 LIGHTNING WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-8933+(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - Thunderbolt 4 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Killer 2.5G LAN - 802.11axe Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.3
shortName: ASRock B860 LIGHTNING WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x
description: ASRock B860 LIGHTNING WIFI ATX motherboard with LGA 1851 socket, PCIe 5.0, Thunderbolt 4, and Wi-Fi 6E for high-end Intel builds.
